## Entry 246
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T18:06:48.047Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:06:48.047Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_axHaastWzjR91Ng9P4JM8KGc",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 3942d4\nWall time: 0.0512 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1193\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.arch;\n\nimport com.tngtech.archunit.junit.AnalyzeClasses;\nimport com.tngtech.archunit.junit.ArchTest;\nimport com.tngtech.archunit.lang.ArchRule;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CartAssembledEvent;\nimport java.lang.reflect.RecordComponent;\nimport java.util.Arrays;\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n\nimport static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.classes;\nimport static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.noClasses;\n\n@AnalyzeClasses(packages = \"com.eventplatform.bookinginventory\")\nclass BookingInventoryArchTest {\n\n    /**\n     * Hard Rule #1 — booking-inventory must not reach into scheduling internals directly.\n     * All access to scheduling data goes through shared reader interfaces only.\n     */\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_depend_on_scheduling_domain_service_or_repository =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\n                \"..com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain..\",\n                \"..com.eventplatform.scheduling.service..\",\n                \"..com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository..\"\n            );\n\n    /**\n     * Interface migration rule — confirms SchedulingSlotClient (deleted HTTP client) has no remaining references.\n     * booking-inventory must use SlotSummaryReader / SlotPricingReader from shared, not direct HTTP.\n     */\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_use_shared_slot_reader_contracts_not_scheduling_http_client =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .haveSimpleNameEndingWith(\"SchedulingSlotClient\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_import_identity_entity_or_repository_in_booking_inventory =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\n                \"..com.eventplatform.identity.domain..\",\n                \"..com.eventplatform.identity.repository..\"\n            );\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_import_payments_ticketing_in_booking_inventory =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing..\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_call_eventbrite_http_directly_from_booking_inventory_service =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory.service..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.client..\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_declare_ControllerAdvice_in_booking_inventory =\n        classes()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().notBeAnnotatedWith(org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ControllerAdvice.class)\n            .andShould().notBeAnnotatedWith(org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestControllerAdvice.class);\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_enforce_mapper_layer_for_all_domain_to_dto_conversions =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory.api.controller..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..bookinginventory.domain..\");\n\n    @Test\n    void should_not_publish_CartAssembledEvent_without_orgId_and_ebEventId() {\n        RecordComponent[] components = CartAssembledEvent.class.getRecordComponents();\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(components).map(RecordComponent::getName))\n            .contains(\"orgId\", \"ebEventId\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_only_publish_events_with_primitives_ids_enums_no_entities() {\n        RecordComponent[] components = CartAssembledEvent.class.getRecordComponents();\n        // CartAssembledEvent: cartId, slotId, userId, orgId (Long x4), ebEventId, couponCode,\n        // currency, userEmail (String x4), totalAmountInSmallestUnit (long primitive) — no entities\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(components).map(c -> c.getType().getSimpleName()))\n            .containsOnly(\"Long\", \"long\", \"String\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_only_save_audit_log_no_update_or_delete() {\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatLockAuditLogRepository.class.getDeclaredMethods())\n            .map(java.lang.reflect.Method::getName))\n            .noneMatch(name -> name.startsWith(\"delete\") || name.startsWith(\"update\"));\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n\nimport static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.classes;\nimport static com.tngtech.archunit.lang.syntax.ArchRuleDefinition.noClasses;\n\n@AnalyzeClasses(packages = \"com.eventplatform.bookinginventory\")\nclass BookingInventoryArchTest {\n\n    /**\n     * Hard Rule #1 — booking-inventory must not reach into scheduling internals directly.\n     * All access to scheduling data goes through shared reader interfaces only.\n     */\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_depend_on_scheduling_domain_service_or_repository =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\n                \"..com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain..\",\n                \"..com.eventplatform.scheduling.service..\",\n should_use_shared_slot_reader_contracts_not_scheduling_http_client =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .haveSimpleNameEndingWith(\"SchedulingSlotClient\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_import_identity_entity_or_repository_in_booking_inventory =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\n                \"..com.eventplatform.identity.domain..\",\n                \"..com.eventplatform.identity.repository..\"\n            );\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_import_payments_ticketing_in_booking_inventory =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing..\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_call_eventbrite_http_directly_from_booking_inventory_service =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory.service..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.client..\");\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_not_declare_ControllerAdvice_in_booking_inventory =\n        classes()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory..\")\n            .should().notBeAnnotatedWith(org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ControllerAdvice.class)\n            .andShould().notBeAnnotatedWith(org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestControllerAdvice.class);\n\n    @ArchTest\n    static final ArchRule should_enforce_mapper_layer_for_all_domain_to_dto_conversions =\n        noClasses()\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\"..bookinginventory.api.controller..\")\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\"..bookinginventory.domain..\");\n\n    @Test\n    void should_not_publish_CartAssembledEvent_without_orgId_and_ebEventId() {\n        RecordComponent[] components = CartAssembledEvent.class.getRecordComponents();\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(components).map(RecordComponent::getName))\n            .contains(\"orgId\", \"ebEventId\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_only_publish_events_with_primitives_ids_enums_no_entities() {\n        RecordComponent[] components = CartAssembledEvent.class.getRecordComponents();\n        // CartAssembledEvent: cartId, slotId, userId, orgId (Long x4), ebEventId, couponCode,\n        // currency, userEmail (String x4), totalAmountInSmallestUnit (long primitive) — no entities\n        assertThat(Arrays.stream(components).map(c -> c.getType().getSimpleName()))\n            .containsOnly(\"Long\", \"long\", \"String\");\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_only_save_audit_log_no_update_or_delete() {\n .noneMatch(name -> name.startsWith(\"delete\") || name.startsWith(\"update\"));\n    }\n}\n"

 return new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(\n            new AuthenticatedUser(1L, \"USER\", null, null),\n            null,\n            List.of(new SimpleGrantedAuthority(\"ROLE_USER\"))\n        );\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 281
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T18:08:16.354Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:08:16.354Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/BookingTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\n\\nclass BookingTest {\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_transition_pending_to_confirmed_when_confirm_called() {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 1L, 2L, 3L, 4L, 5000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n\\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\\n        assertThat(booking.getStripePaymentIntentId()).isEqualTo(\\\"pi_123\\\");\\n        assertThat(booking.getStripeChargeId()).isEqualTo(\\\"ch_123\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_transition_confirmed_to_cancellation_pending_when_mark_cancellation_pending_called() {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 1L, 2L, 3L, 4L, 5000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n\\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\\n\\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_transition_cancellation_pending_to_cancelled_when_cancel_called() {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 1L, 2L, 3L, 4L, 5000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\\n\\n        booking.cancel();\\n\\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_when_transitioning_confirmed_to_cancelled_directly() {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 1L, 2L, 3L, 4L, 5000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::cancel)\\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class)\\n            .hasMessageContaining(\\\"cannot be cancelled\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_when_transitioning_cancelled_to_any_state() {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 1L, 2L, 3L, 4L, 5000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\\n        booking.cancel();\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> booking.confirm(\\\"pi_999\\\", \\\"ch_999\\\"))\\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::markCancellationPending)\\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\\n        assertThatThrownBy(booking::cancel)\\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_mPItdYcDRlmB8x72w7wJYUqg"
  }
}
```

## Entry 285
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T18:08:26.963Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:08:26.963Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/RefundTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\n\\nclass RefundTest {\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_transition_pending_to_succeeded_when_update_status_called() {\\n        Refund refund = new Refund(1L, \\\"re_123\\\", 1000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER, RefundStatus.PENDING);\\n\\n        refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED);\\n\\n        assertThat(refund.getStatus()).isEqualTo(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_transition_pending_to_failed_when_update_status_called() {\\n        Refund refund = new Refund(1L, \\\"re_123\\\", 1000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER, RefundStatus.PENDING);\\n\\n        refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.FAILED);\\n\\n        assertThat(refund.getStatus()).isEqualTo(RefundStatus.FAILED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_when_transitioning_succeeded_to_failed() {\\n        Refund refund = new Refund(1L, \\\"re_123\\\", 1000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER, RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED);\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.FAILED))\\n            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class)\\n            .hasMessageContaining(\\\"terminal\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_MpYDZzpyfCX8sp3wiAaZRA6n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 290
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T18:08:36.931Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:08:36.931Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/ETicketTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.ETicketStatus;\\nimport java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;\\nimport java.util.Base64;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\n\\nclass ETicketTest {\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_encode_qr_code_data_as_booking_ref_colon_item_id() {\\n        String raw = \\\"BK-20260304-001:10\\\";\\n        String encoded = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(raw.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\\n\\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(1L, 10L, encoded, \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/10.pdf\\\");\\n\\n        assertThat(ticket.getQrCodeData()).isEqualTo(encoded);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_transition_active_to_voided_when_void_ticket_called() {\\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(1L, 10L, \\\"qr\\\", \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/10.pdf\\\");\\n\\n        ticket.voidTicket();\\n\\n        assertThat(ticket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_keep_ticket_voided_when_void_ticket_called_multiple_times() {\\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(1L, 10L, \\\"qr\\\", \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/10.pdf\\\");\\n\\n        ticket.voidTicket();\\n        ticket.voidTicket();\\n\\n        assertThat(ticket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_OzG8C6gGUpFw18VBXgABkbra"
  }
}
```

when(slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(21L)).thenReturn(new SlotSummaryDto(21L, \\\"ACTIVE\\\", \\\"ev_1\\\", SeatingMode.RESERVED, 1L, 2L, 3L, null));\\n\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 21L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n        when(bookingRepository.save(any(Booking.class))).thenReturn(booking);\\n        when(stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(any())).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\\\"stripe down\\\"));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.createCheckout(event)).isInstanceOf(RuntimeException.class);\\n\\n        verify(paymentRepository, never()).save(any(Payment.class));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_confirm_payment_and_create_items_and_tickets_when_stripe_status_succeeded() {\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \\\"pi_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n\\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\\\"pi_123\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"secret\\\", \\\"succeeded\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\"));\\n\\n        CartItemSnapshotDto cartItem = new CartItemSnapshotDto(1L, 101L, null, \\\"TC-1\\\", 75000L, \\\"inr\\\", 1);\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(11L)).thenReturn(List.of(cartItem));\\n\\n        BookingItem savedItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \\\"TC-1\\\", 75000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(savedItem, \\\"id\\\", 501L);\\n        when(bookingItemRepository.save(any(BookingItem.class))).thenReturn(savedItem);\\n\\n        ETicket savedTicket = new ETicket(91L, 501L, \\\"encoded-qr\\\", \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/501.pdf\\\");\\n        when(eTicketRepository.save(any(ETicket.class))).thenReturn(savedTicket);\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(savedTicket));\\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(savedItem));\\n\\n        when(bookingMapper.toResponse(booking)).thenReturn(new BookingResponse(\\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\\n            BookingStatus.CONFIRMED,\\n            booking.getSlotId(),\\n            booking.getTotalAmount(),\\n            booking.getCurrency(),\\n            \\\"pi_123\\\",\\n            List.of(),\\n            Instant.parse(\\\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\\\")\\n        ));\\n        when(eTicketMapper.toResponse(savedTicket)).thenReturn(new ETicketResponse(\\n            null,\\n            501L,\\n            savedTicket.getQrCodeData(),\\n            savedTicket.getPdfUrl(),\\n            ETicketStatus.ACTIVE\\n        ));\\n\\n        BookingResponse response = paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \\\"pi_123\\\");\\n\\n        assertThat(response.status()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\\n        assertThat(response.items()).hasSize(1);\\n        assertThat(response.items().get(0).eTicket().ticketCode()).isEqualTo(\\\"BK-20260304-001:501\\\");\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<BookingConfirmedEvent> eventCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(BookingConfirmedEvent.class);\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(eventCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(eventCaptor.getValue().seatIds()).containsExactly(101L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_existing_booking_when_payment_already_confirmed() {\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \\\"pi_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        payment.markSuccess(\\\"ch_123\\\");\\n\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n\\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of());\\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of());\\n        when(bookingMapper.toResponse(booking)).thenReturn(new BookingResponse(\\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\\n            booking.getStatus(),\\n            booking.getSlotId(),\\n            booking.getTotalAmount(),\\n            booking.getCurrency(),\\n            booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\\n            List.of(),\\n            Instant.parse(\\\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\\\")\\n        ));\\n\\n        BookingResponse response = paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \\\"pi_123\\\");\\n\\n        assertThat(response.bookingRef()).isEqualTo(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\");\\n        verify(stripePaymentService, never()).getPaymentIntent(any());\\n        verify(bookingItemRepository, never()).save(any(BookingItem.class));\\n        verify(eTicketRepository, never()).save(any(ETicket.class));\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher, never()).publish(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_payment_not_confirmed_when_stripe_status_requires_action() {\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \\\"pi_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n\\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\\\"pi_123\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"secret\\\", \\\"requires_action\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", null));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \\\"pi_123\\\"))\\n            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotConfirmedException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_and_leave_pending_state_when_confirm_payment_stripe_retrieve_times_out() {\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \\\"pi_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n\\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\\\"timeout\\\"));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \\\"pi_123\\\"))\\n            .isInstanceOf(RuntimeException.class)\\n            .hasMessageContaining(\\\"timeout\\\");\\n\\n        assertThat(payment.getStatus()).isEqualTo(PaymentStatus.PENDING);\\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.PENDING);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_and_not_publish_event_when_cart_items_fetch_returns_empty() {\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \\\"pi_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n\\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(\\\"pi_123\\\"))\\n            .thenReturn(new StripePaymentIntentResponse(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"secret\\\", \\\"succeeded\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\"));\\n        when(cartSnapshotReader.getCartItems(11L)).thenReturn(List.of());\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.confirmPayment(31L, \\\"pi_123\\\"))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CartItemsFetchException.class);\\n\\n        verify(bookingItemRepository, never()).save(any(BookingItem.class));\\n        verify(eTicketRepository, never()).save(any(ETicket.class));\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher, never()).publish(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_set_payment_failed_and_booking_cancelled_and_publish_event_when_handle_failure_called() {\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \\\"pi_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n        BookingItem seatItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \\\"TC-1\\\", 75000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        BookingItem gaItem = new BookingItem(91L, null, 201L, \\\"TC-2\\\", 75000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n\\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(seatItem, gaItem));\\n\\n        paymentService.handleFailure(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"card_declined\\\", \\\"declined\\\");\\n\\n        assertThat(payment.getStatus()).isEqualTo(PaymentStatus.FAILED);\\n        assertThat(payment.getFailureCode()).isEqualTo(\\\"card_declined\\\");\\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\\n\\n        ArgumentCaptor<PaymentFailedEvent> eventCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(PaymentFailedEvent.class);\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(eventCaptor.capture());\\n        assertThat(eventCaptor.getValue().seatIds()).containsExactly(101L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_do_nothing_when_handle_failure_called_for_already_failed_payment() {\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(91L, \\\"pi_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        payment.markFailed(\\\"declined\\\", \\\"failed\\\");\\n        when(paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(\\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\\n\\n        paymentService.handleFailure(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"declined\\\", \\\"failed\\\");\\n\\n        verify(bookingRepository, never()).findById(any());\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher, never()).publish(any());\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_pc6Ea6fvel0XMKOCVt38zwf0"

 void should_finalise_after_refund_by_voiding_tickets_and_publishing_booking_cancelled_event() {\\n        CancellationService service = createService(\\\"http://localhost:9\\\", 24, 0);\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n\\n        BookingItem bookingItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \\\"TC-1\\\", 150000L, assertThat(ticket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\\n        assertThat(refund.getStatus()).isEqualTo(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED);\\n        assertThat(request.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CancellationRequestStatus.APPROVED);\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(any(BookingCancelledEvent.class));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_do_nothing_when_finalise_after_refund_called_for_already_cancelled_booking() {\\n        CancellationService service = createService(\\\"http://localhost:9\\\", 24, 0);\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\\n        booking.cancel();\\n\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n        service.finaliseAfterRefund(91L);\\n\\n        verify(bookingItemRepository, never()).findByBookingId(any());\\n baseUrl, int windowHours, int feePercent) {\\n        return new CancellationService(\\n            bookingRepository,\\n            bookingItemRepository,\\n            eTicketRepository,\\n            refundRepository,\\n            cancellationRequestRepository,\\n            stripeRefundService,\\n            afterCommitEventPublisher,\\n            baseUrl,\\n            windowHours,\\n            feePercent\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private Booking confirmedBooking(Long id, String ref, Long userId, Long cartId, Long slotId, Long totalAmount) {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(ref, cartId, userId, 44L, slotId, totalAmount, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", id);\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n        return booking;\\n    }\\n\\n    private SlotTimingServer startSlotTimingServer(Long slotId, Instant startTime) throws IOException {\\n        HttpServer server = HttpServer.create(new InetSocketAddress(0), 0);\\n        AtomicReference<String> bodyRef = new AtomicReference<>();\\n        server.createContext(\\\"/internal/scheduling/slots/\\\" + slotId + \\\"/timing\\\", exchange -> {\\n            String body = \\\"{\\\\\\\"slotId\\\\\\\":\\\" + slotId + \\\",\\\\\\\"startTime\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\" + startTime + \\\"\\\\\\\"}\\\";\\n            bodyRef.set(body);\\n            byte[] payload = body.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);\\n            exchange.getResponseHeaders().add(\\\"Content-Type\\\", \\\"application/json\\\");\\n            exchange.sendResponseHeaders(200, payload.length);\\n            try (OutputStream os = exchange.getResponseBody()) {\\n                os.write(payload);\\n            }\\n        });\\n        server.start();\\n        return new SlotTimingServer(server, \\\"http://localhost:\\\" + server.getAddress().getPort());\\n    }\\n\\n    private record SlotTimingServer(HttpServer server, String baseUrl) implements AutoCloseable {\\n        @Override\\n        public void close() {\\n            server.stop(0);\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

org.springframework.test.util.ReflectionTestUtils;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass CancellationServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private RefundRepository refundRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_cancel_with_full_refund_and_finalise_when_stripe_refund_succeeds_immediately() throws Exception {\\n        Instant slotStart = Instant.now().plusSeconds(72 * 3600);\\n        try (SlotTimingServer server = startSlotTimingServer(21L, slotStart)) {\\n            CancellationService service = createService(server.baseUrl(), 24, 0);\\n            Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n            when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n            CancellationRequest cancellationRequest = new CancellationRequest(91L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER);\\n            when(cancellationRequestRepository.save(any(CancellationRequest.class))).thenReturn(cancellationRequest);\\n\\n            when(stripeRefundService.createRefund(any(StripeRefundRequest.class)))\\n                .thenReturn(new StripeRefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", \\\"succeeded\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n            Refund savedRefund = new Refund(91L, \\\"re_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER, RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED);\\n            when(refundRepository.save(any(Refund.class))).thenReturn(savedRefund);\\n\\n            BookingItem bookingItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \\\"TC-1\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n            ETicket ticket = new ETicket(91L, 501L, \\\"qr\\\", \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/501.pdf\\\");\\n            when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(bookingItem));\\n            when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(ticket));\\n            when(refundRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(savedRefund));\\n            when(cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(cancellationRequest));\\n            when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n            CancellationResponse response = service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER);\\n\\n            assertThat(response.refund().amount()).isEqualTo(150000L);\\n            assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\\n            assertThat(bookingItem.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingItemStatus.CANCELLED);\\n            assertThat(ticket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\\n\\n            ArgumentCaptor<BookingCancelledEvent> eventCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(BookingCancelledEvent.class);\\n            verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(eventCaptor.capture());\\n            assertThat(eventCaptor.getValue().seatIds()).containsExactly(101L);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_deduct_fee_percent_from_refund_amount_when_partial_refund_is_configured() throws Exception {\\n        Instant slotStart = Instant.now().plusSeconds(72 * 3600);\\n        try (SlotTimingServer server = startSlotTimingServer(21L, slotStart)) {\\n            CancellationService service = createService(server.baseUrl(), 24, 10);\\n            Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n     .thenReturn(new CancellationRequest(91L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER));\\n            when(stripeRefundService.createRefund(any(StripeRefundRequest.class)))\\n                .thenReturn(new StripeRefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", \\\"pending\\\", 135000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n            when(refundRepository.save(any(Refund.class)))\\n                .thenAnswer(invocation -> invocation.getArgument(0));\\n\\n            service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER);\\n\\n            ArgumentCaptor<StripeRefundRequest> requestCaptor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(StripeRefundRequest.class);\\n            verify(stripeRefundService).createRefund(requestCaptor.capture());\\n            assertThat(requestCaptor.getValue().amount()).isEqualTo(135000L);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_keep_booking_cancellation_pending_when_refund_is_async_pending() throws Exception {\\n        Instant slotStart = Instant.now().plusSeconds(72 * 3600);\\n        try (SlotTimingServer server = startSlotTimingServer(21L, slotStart)) {\\n            CancellationService service = createService(server.baseUrl(), 24, 0);\\n            Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n            when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n            when(cancellationRequestRepository.save(any(CancellationRequest.class)))\\n                .thenReturn(new CancellationRequest(91L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER));\\n            when(stripeRefundService.createRefund(any(StripeRefundRequest.class)))\\n                .thenReturn(new StripeRefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", \\\"pending\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n            when(refundRepository.save(any(Refund.class)))\\n                .thenAnswer(invocation -> invocation.getArgument(0));\\n\\n            CancellationResponse response = service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER);\\n\\n            assertThat(response.status()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING);\\n            assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING);\\n            verify(afterCommitEventPublisher, never()).publish(any());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_when_cancellation_window_has_closed() throws Exception {\\n        Instant slotStart = Instant.now().plusSeconds(2 * 3600);\\n        try (SlotTimingServer server = startSlotTimingServer(21L, slotStart)) {\\n            CancellationService service = createService(server.baseUrl(), 24, 0);\\n            Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n            when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n            assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n                .isInstanceOf(CancellationNotAllowedException.class);\\n\\n            verify(stripeRefundService, never()).createRefund(any());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_when_cancelling_booking_in_pending_state() {\\n        CancellationService service = createService(\\\"http://localhost:9\\\", 24, 0);\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CancellationNotAllowedException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_when_cancelling_booking_already_cancelled() {\\n        CancellationService service = createService(\\\"http://localhost:9\\\", 24, 0);\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\\n        booking.cancel();\\n        when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .isInstanceOf(CancellationNotAllowedException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_throw_booking_not_found_when_user_is_not_owner() {\\n        CancellationService service = createService(\\\"http://localhost:9\\\", 24, 0);\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 77L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n        when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n        assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .isInstanceOf(BookingNotFoundException.class);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_revert_booking_to_confirmed_when_stripe_refund_fails() throws Exception {\\n        Instant slotStart = Instant.now().plusSeconds(72 * 3600);\\n        try (SlotTimingServer server = startSlotTimingServer(21L, slotStart)) {\\n            CancellationService service = createService(server.baseUrl(), 24, 0);\\n            Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n            when(bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n            CancellationRequest request = new CancellationRequest(91L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER);\\n            when(cancellationRequestRepository.save(any(CancellationRequest.class))).thenReturn(request);\\n            when(stripeRefundService.createRefund(any(StripeRefundRequest.class)))\\n                .thenThrow(new StripeIntegrationException(\\\"stripe down\\\"));\\n\\n            assertThatThrownBy(() -> service.cancel(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n                .isInstanceOf(RefundFailedException.class);\\n\\n            assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\\n            assertThat(request.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CancellationRequestStatus.REJECTED);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_finalise_after_refund_by_voiding_tickets_and_publishing_booking_cancelled_event() {\\n        CancellationService service = createService(\\\"http://localhost:9\\\", 24, 0);\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n\\n        BookingItem bookingItem = new BookingItem(91L, 101L, null, \\\"TC-1\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(91L, 501L, \\\"qr\\\", \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/501.pdf\\\");\\n        Refund refund = new Refund(91L, \\\"re_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER, RefundStatus.PENDING);\\n        CancellationRequest request = new CancellationRequest(91L, 31L, RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER);\\n\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n        when(bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(bookingItem));\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(ticket));\\n        when(refundRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(refund));\\n        when(cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(request));\\n\\n        service.finaliseAfterRefund(91L);\\n\\n        assertThat(booking.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingStatus.CANCELLED);\\n        assertThat(bookingItem.getStatus()).isEqualTo(BookingItemStatus.CANCELLED);\\n        assertThat(ticket.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ETicketStatus.VOIDED);\\n        assertThat(refund.getStatus()).isEqualTo(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED);\\n        assertThat(request.getStatus()).isEqualTo(CancellationRequestStatus.APPROVED);\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher).publish(any(BookingCancelledEvent.class));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_do_nothing_when_finalise_after_refund_called_for_already_cancelled_booking() {\\n        CancellationService service = createService(\\\"http://localhost:9\\\", 24, 0);\\n        Booking booking = confirmedBooking(91L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 31L, 11L, 21L, 150000L);\\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\\n        booking.cancel();\\n\\n        when(bookingRepository.findById(91L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\\n\\n        service.finaliseAfterRefund(91L);\\n\\n        verify(bookingItemRepository, never()).findByBookingId(any());\\n        verify(eTicketRepository, never()).findByBookingId(any());\\n        verify(afterCommitEventPublisher, never()).publish(any());\\n    }\\n\\n    private CancellationService createService(String baseUrl, int windowHours, int feePercent) {\\n        return new CancellationService(\\n            bookingRepository,\\n            bookingItemRepository,\\n            eTicketRepository,\\n            refundRepository,\\n            cancellationRequestRepository,\\n            stripeRefundService,\\n            afterCommitEventPublisher,\\n            baseUrl,\\n            windowHours,\\n            feePercent\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private Booking confirmedBooking(Long id, String ref, Long userId, Long cartId, Long slotId, Long totalAmount) {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(ref, cartId, userId, 44L, slotId, totalAmount, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", id);\\n        booking.confirm(\\\"pi_123\\\", \\\"ch_123\\\");\\n        return booking;\\n    }\\n\\n    private SlotTimingServer startSlotTimingServer(Long slotId, Instant startTime) throws IOException {\\n        HttpServer server = HttpServer.create(new InetSocketAddress(0), 0);\\n        AtomicReference<String> bodyRef = new AtomicReference<>();\\n        server.createContext(\\\"/internal/scheduling/slots/\\\" + slotId + \\\"/timing\\\", exchange -> {\\n            String body = \\\"{\\\\\\\"slotId\\\\\\\":\\\" + slotId + \\\",\\\\\\\"startTime\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"\\\" + startTime + \\\"\\\\\\\"}\\\";\\n            bodyRef.set(body);\\n            byte[] payload = body.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);\\n            exchange.getResponseHeaders().add(\\\"Content-Type\\\", \\\"application/json\\\");\\n            exchange.sendResponseHeaders(200, payload.length);\\n            try (OutputStream os = exchange.getResponseBody()) {\\n                os.write(payload);\\n            }\\n        });\\n        server.start();\\n        return new SlotTimingServer(server, \\\"http://localhost:\\\" + server.getAddress().getPort());\\n    }\\n\\n    private record SlotTimingServer(HttpServer server, String baseUrl) implements AutoCloseable {\\n        @Override\\n        public void close() {\\n            server.stop(0);\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.never;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Refund;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.RefundRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripeRefundService;\\nimport java.util.Optional;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\\nimport org.mockito.Mock;\\nimport org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\\n\\n@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\\nclass RefundServiceTest {\\n\\n    @Mock\\n    private RefundRepository refundRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private CancellationService cancellationService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\\n\\n    private RefundService refundService;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        refundService = new RefundService(refundRepository, cancellationService, stripeRefundService);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_call_finalise_after_refund_when_webhook_status_is_succeeded() {\\n        Refund refund = new Refund(91L, \\\"re_123\\\", 1000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER, RefundStatus.PENDING);\\n        when(refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(\\\"re_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(refund));\\n        when(stripeRefundService.getRefund(\\\"re_123\\\")).thenReturn(new StripeRefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", \\\"succeeded\\\", 1000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        refundService.updateRefundStatus(\\\"re_123\\\");\\n\\n        verify(cancellationService).finaliseAfterRefund(91L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_handle_failed_refund_without_publishing_cancel_event() {\\n        Refund refund = new Refund(91L, \\\"re_123\\\", 1000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER, RefundStatus.PENDING);\\n        when(refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(\\\"re_123\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.of(refund));\\n        when(stripeRefundService.getRefund(\\\"re_123\\\")).thenReturn(new StripeRefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", \\\"failed\\\", 1000L, \\\"inr\\\"));\\n\\n        refundService.updateRefundStatus(\\\"re_123\\\");\\n\\n        verify(cancellationService).handleRefundFailed(\\\"re_123\\\");\\n        verify(cancellationService, never()).finaliseAfterRefund(91L);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_without_stripe_call_when_refund_id_not_found() {\\n        when(refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(\\\"re_missing\\\")).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\\n\\n        refundService.updateRefundStatus(\\\"re_missing\\\");\\n\\n        verify(stripeRefundService, never()).getRefund(\\\"re_missing\\\");\\n        verify(cancellationService, never()).finaliseAfterRefund(91L);\\n        verify(cancellationService, never()).handleRefundFailed(\\\"re_missing\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_ReIgDlRtZFjaI2g7OaWT1d1y"
  }
}

private BookingService bookingService;\\n    @Mock\\n    private ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\\n    @Mock\\n    private ETicketMapper eTicketMapper;\\n\\n    private ETicketService eTicketService;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUp() {\\n        eTicketService = new ETicketService(bookingService, eTicketRepository, eTicketMapper);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_tickets_for_owned_booking_with_expected_ticket_code_format() {\\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 11L, 31L, 44L, 21L, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\");\\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \\\"id\\\", 91L);\\n\\n        ETicket ticket = new ETicket(91L, 501L, \\\"encodedQr\\\", \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/501.pdf\\\");\\n        when(bookingService.getOwnedBooking(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(booking);\\n        when(eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(91L)).thenReturn(List.of(ticket));\\n        when(eTicketMapper.toResponse(ticket)).thenReturn(new ETicketResponse(null, 501L, \\\"encodedQr\\\", \\\"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/501.pdf\\\", ETicketStatus.ACTIVE));\\n\\n        TicketsByBookingResponse response = eTicketService.getTickets(31L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\");\\n\\n        assertThat(response.bookingRef()).isEqualTo(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\");\\n        assertThat(response.tickets()).hasSize(1);\\n        assertThat(response.tickets().get(0).ticketCode()).isEqualTo(\\\"BK-20260304-001:501\\\");\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_zwXhbADc8ab5Q1kGUbD0dKJX"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.controller.PaymentController;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CheckoutInitResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;\\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Import;\\nimport org.springframework.security.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken;\\nimport org.springframework.security.core.authority.SimpleGrantedAuthority;\\nimport org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;\\n\\n@WebMvcTest(controllers = PaymentController.class)\\n@Import({SecurityConfig.class, GlobalExceptionHandler.class})\\nclass PaymentControllerTest {\\n\\n    @Autowired\\n    private MockMvc mockMvc;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private PaymentService paymentService;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUpFilterPassThrough() throws Exception {\\n        doAnswer(invocation -> {\\n            jakarta.servlet.FilterChain chain = invocation.getArgument(2);\\n            chain.doFilter(invocation.getArgument(0), invocation.getArgument(1));\\n            return null;\\n        }).when(jwtAuthenticationFilter).doFilter(any(), any(), any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_with_client_secret_when_checkout_exists() throws Exception {\\n        when(paymentService.getCheckout(42L, 1L)).thenReturn(new CheckoutInitResponse(\\n            42L,\\n            \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n            \\\"pi_123\\\",\\n            \\\"secret_123\\\",\\n            150000L,\\n            \\\"inr\\\"\\n        ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/payments/checkout/42\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.paymentIntentId\\\").value(\\\"pi_123\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.clientSecret\\\").value(\\\"secret_123\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_404_when_checkout_cart_unknown() throws Exception {\\n        when(paymentService.getCheckout(42L, 1L)).thenThrow(new BookingNotFoundException(\\\"cart-42\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/payments/checkout/42\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"BOOKING_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_409_when_payment_already_exists() throws Exception {\\n        when(paymentService.getCheckout(42L, 1L)).thenThrow(new DuplicatePaymentException(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/payments/checkout/42\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isConflict())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"PAYMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_when_confirm_succeeds() throws Exception {\\n        when(paymentService.confirmPayment(1L, \\\"pi_123\\\")).thenReturn(new BookingResponse(\\n            \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n            BookingStatus.CONFIRMED,\\n            21L,\\n            150000L,\\n            \\\"inr\\\",\\n            \\\"pi_123\\\",\\n            List.of(),\\n            Instant.parse(\\\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\\\")\\n        ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/payments/confirm\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"paymentIntentId\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"pi_123\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.status\\\").value(\\\"CONFIRMED\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_402_when_confirm_requires_action() throws Exception {\\n        when(paymentService.confirmPayment(1L, \\\"pi_123\\\")).thenThrow(new PaymentNotConfirmedException(\\\"requires_action\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/payments/confirm\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"paymentIntentId\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"pi_123\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isPaymentRequired())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"PAYMENT_NOT_CONFIRMED\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_409_when_confirm_called_for_already_confirmed_booking() throws Exception {\\n        when(paymentService.confirmPayment(1L, \\\"pi_123\\\")).thenThrow(new DuplicatePaymentException(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/payments/confirm\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"paymentIntentId\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"pi_123\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isConflict())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"PAYMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_when_failure_reported_by_frontend() throws Exception {\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/payments/failed\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"paymentIntentId\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"pi_123\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.message\\\").value(\\\"Seat locks released. Cart cleared.\\\"));\\n\\n        verify(paymentService).handleFailure(\\\"pi_123\\\", null, \\\"frontend_reported_failure\\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_404_when_failed_called_with_unknown_payment_intent() throws Exception {\\n        doThrow(new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(\\\"pi_missing\\\"))\\n            .when(paymentService).handleFailure(\\\"pi_missing\\\", null, \\\"frontend_reported_failure\\\");\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/payments/failed\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"paymentIntentId\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"pi_missing\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"PAYMENT_INTENT_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken userAuthentication() {\\n        return new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(\\n            new AuthenticatedUser(1L, \\\"USER\\\", null, null),\\n            null,\\n            List.of(new SimpleGrantedAuthority(\\\"ROLE_USER\\\"))\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

org.springframework.data.domain.PageImpl;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\\nimport org.springframework.security.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken;\\nimport org.springframework.security.core.authority.SimpleGrantedAuthority;\\nimport org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;\\n\\n@WebMvcTest(controllers = BookingController.class)\\n@Import({SecurityConfig.class, GlobalExceptionHandler.class})\\nclass BookingControllerTest {\\n\\n    @Autowired\\n    private MockMvc mockMvc;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private BookingService bookingService;\\n    @MockBean\\n    private CancellationService cancellationService;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUpFilterPassThrough() throws Exception {\\n        doAnswer(invocation -> {\\n            jakarta.servlet.FilterChain chain = invocation.getArgument(2);\\n            chain.doFilter(invocation.getArgument(0), invocation.getArgument(1));\\n            return null;\\n        }).when(jwtAuthenticationFilter).doFilter(any(), any(), any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_with_paginated_bookings_for_authenticated_user() throws Exception {\\n        when(bookingService.listBookings(any(), any())).thenReturn(new PageImpl<>(\\n            List.of(new BookingSummaryResponse(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", 21L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED, 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", Instant.parse(\\\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\\\"))),\\n            PageRequest.of(0, 10),\\n            1\\n        ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.content[0].bookingRef\\\").value(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_401_for_bookings_list_without_jwt() throws Exception {\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isUnauthorized());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_with_booking_detail_for_owner() throws Exception {\\n        when(bookingService.getBooking(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\")).thenReturn(new BookingResponse(\\n            \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n            BookingStatus.CONFIRMED,\\n            21L,\\n            150000L,\\n            \\\"inr\\\",\\n            \\\"pi_123\\\",\\n            List.of(),\\n            Instant.parse(\\\"2026-03-04T10:00:00Z\\\")\\n        ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.bookingRef\\\").value(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_404_for_non_owner_or_unknown_booking_ref() throws Exception {\\n        when(bookingService.getBooking(1L, \\\"BK-UNKNOWN\\\")).thenThrow(new BookingNotFoundException(\\\"BK-UNKNOWN\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-UNKNOWN\\\").with(authentication(userAuthentication())))\\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"BOOKING_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_when_cancellation_is_within_window() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenReturn(new CancellationResponse(\\n                \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n                BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING,\\n                new RefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundStatus.PENDING)\\n            ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.status\\\").value(\\\"CANCELLATION_PENDING\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_409_when_cancellation_window_closed() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenThrow(new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Cancellation window has closed\\\", Map.of(\\\"windowClosedAt\\\", \\\"2026-03-04T08:00:00Z\\\")));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isConflict())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_409_when_booking_status_not_confirmed_for_cancellation() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenThrow(new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\\\", Map.of(\\\"currentStatus\\\", \\\"PENDING\\\")));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isConflict());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_404_when_non_owner_attempts_cancellation() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenThrow(new BookingNotFoundException(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"BOOKING_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken userAuthentication() {\\n        return new .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"BOOKING_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_200_when_cancellation_is_within_window() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenReturn(new CancellationResponse(\\n                \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\",\\n                BookingStatus.CANCELLATION_PENDING,\\n                new RefundResponse(\\\"re_123\\\", 150000L, \\\"inr\\\", RefundStatus.PENDING)\\n            ));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.status\\\").value(\\\"CANCELLATION_PENDING\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_409_when_cancellation_window_closed() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenThrow(new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Cancellation window has closed\\\", Map.of(\\\"windowClosedAt\\\", \\\"2026-03-04T08:00:00Z\\\")));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isConflict())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_409_when_booking_status_not_confirmed_for_cancellation() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenThrow(new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\\\", Map.of(\\\"currentStatus\\\", \\\"PENDING\\\")));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isConflict());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_404_when_non_owner_attempts_cancellation() throws Exception {\\n        when(cancellationService.cancel(1L, \\\"BK-20260304-001\\\", RefundReason.REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER))\\n            .thenThrow(new BookingNotFoundException(\\\"BK-20260304-001\\\"));\\n\\n        mockMvc.perform(post(\\\"/api/v1/bookings/BK-20260304-001/cancel\\\")\\n                .with(authentication(userAuthentication()))\\n                .contentType(\\\"application/json\\\")\\n                .content(\\\"{\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\\\\\\\"}\\\"))\\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound())\\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\\\"$.errorCode\\\").value(\\\"BOOKING_NOT_FOUND\\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    private UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken userAuthentication() {\\n        return new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(\\n            new AuthenticatedUser(1L, \\\"USER\\\", null, null),\\n            null,\\n            List.of(new SimpleGrantedAuthority(\\\"ROLE_USER\\\"))\\n        );\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:13:33.478Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/StripeWebhookControllerTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api;\\n\\nimport static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.doAnswer;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.doNothing;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\nimport static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.post;\\nimport static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.jsonPath;\\nimport static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers.status;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.controller.StripeWebhookController;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.PaymentService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service.RefundService;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.SecurityConfig;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeWebhookEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeWebhookSignatureException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.webhook.StripeWebhookHandler;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;\\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.mock.mockito.MockBean;\\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Import;\\nimport org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;\\n\\n@WebMvcTest(controllers = StripeWebhookController.class)\\n@Import({SecurityConfig.class, GlobalExceptionHandler.class})\\nclass StripeWebhookControllerTest {\\n\\n    @Autowired\\n    private MockMvc mockMvc;\\n\\n    @MockBean\\n    private StripeWebhookHandler stripeWebhookHandler;\\n    @MockBean\\n    private PaymentService paymentService;\\n    @MockBean\\n    private RefundService refundService;\\n    @MockBean\\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\\n\\n    @BeforeEach\\n    void setUpFilterPassThrough() throws Exception {\\n        doAnswer(invocation -> {\\n            jakarta.servlet.FilterChain chain = invocation.getArgument(2);\\n            chain.doFilter(invocation.getArgument(0), invocation.getArgument(1));\\n            return null;\\n        }).when(jwtAuthenticationFilter).doFilter(any(), any(), any());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void should_return_400_when_stripe_signature_invalid() throws Exception {\\n \\\"..com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository..\\\");\\n\\n    @ArchTest\\n    static final ArchRule no_class_in_paymentsticketing_imports_from_identity_package =\\n        noClasses()\\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\\\"..paymentsticketing..\\\")\\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\\\"..com.eventplatform.identity.domain..\\\", \\\"..com.eventplatform.identity.repository..\\\");\\n\\n    @ArchTest\\n    static final ArchRule no_controller_advice_annotation_in_paymentsticketing_package =\\n        noClasses()\\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\\\"..paymentsticketing..\\\")\\n            .should().beAnnotatedWith(ControllerAdvice.class)\\n            .orShould().beAnnotatedWith(RestControllerAdvice.class);\\n\\n    @ArchTest\\n    static final ArchRule no_stripe_sdk_import_outside_shared_stripe_package =\\n        noClasses()\\n            .that().resideInAPackage(\\\"..paymentsticketing..\\\")\\n            .should().dependOnClassesThat()\\n            .resideInAnyPackage(\\\"com.stripe..\\\");\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

## Entry 352
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T18:13:51.705Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:13:51.705Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_5tZQXzGrlEHNrtUuKrhJyMSF",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest.java\n@@\n     private final BookingRepository bookingRepository = mock(BookingRepository.class);\n     private final PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl reader = new PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl(bookingRepository);\n \n     @Test\n-    void isPaymentConfirmed_returnsTrue_whenBookingIsConfirmed() {\n+    void should_return_true_when_booking_exists_with_confirmed_status() {\n         when(bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(10L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED)).thenReturn(true);\n \n         assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(10L)).isTrue();\n     }\n \n     @Test\n-    void isPaymentConfirmed_returnsFalse_whenCartIdNullOrNotConfirmed() {\n+    void should_return_false_when_no_confirmed_booking_exists() {\n         when(bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(11L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED)).thenReturn(false);\n \n         assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(null)).isFalse();\n         assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(11L)).isFalse();\n     }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest.java\n@@\n     private final BookingRepository bookingRepository = mock(BookingRepository.class);\n     private final PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl reader = new PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl(bookingRepository);\n \n     @Test\n-    void isPaymentConfirmed_returnsTrue_whenBookingIsConfirmed() {\n+    void should_return_true_when_booking_exists_with_confirmed_status() {\n         when(bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(10L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED)).thenReturn(true);\n \n         assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(10L)).isTrue();\n     }\n \n     @Test\n-    void isPaymentConfirmed_returnsFalse_whenCartIdNullOrNotConfirmed() {\n+    void should_return_false_when_no_confirmed_booking_exists() {\n         when(bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(11L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED)).thenReturn(false);\n \n         assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(null)).isFalse();\n         assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(11L)).isFalse();\n     }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}

## Entry 357
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T18:13:55.793Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:13:55.793Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "I found two implementation gaps that Stage 8 tests will fail on: `Refund` currently allows invalid terminal transitions, and webhook signature errors currently map to `500` instead of `400`. I’m patching those now before running tests.",
    "phase": "commentary"
  }
}
```

**Role/Type:** response_item

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:13:58.054Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_pniY73mq4pdA4ceSmZZxjv0r",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/domain/Refund.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundReason;\n import com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.RefundStatus;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\n@@\n     public void updateStatus(RefundStatus status) {\n+        if (this.status == RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED && status != RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED) {\n+            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Refund is terminal in SUCCEEDED state\", \"INVALID_REFUND_STATE\");\n+        }\n         this.status = status;\n     }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 363
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T18:14:04.916Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T18:14:04.916Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_fxyl7tY7IAD1gIGIA4t9BGzj",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: shared/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/shared/common/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java\n@@\n import java.time.Instant;\n import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\n import org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException;\n import org.springframework.security.authorization.AuthorizationDeniedException;\n import org.springframework.security.core.AuthenticationException;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ExceptionHandler;\n import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestControllerAdvice;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeWebhookSignatureException;\n@@\n     @ExceptionHandler(AuthenticationException.class)\n     public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleAuthentication(AuthenticationException ex) {\n         ErrorResponse response = new ErrorResponse(\n             \"UNAUTHORIZED\",\n             \"Unauthorized\",\n@@\n         );\n         return ResponseEntity.status(401).body(response);\n     }\n+\n+    @ExceptionHandler(StripeWebhookSignatureException.class)\n+    public ResponseEntity<ErrorResponse> handleStripeWebhookSignature(StripeWebhookSignatureException ex) {\n+        ErrorResponse response = new ErrorResponse(\n+            \"INVALID_WEBHOOK_SIGNATURE\",\n+            \"Invalid webhook signature\",\n+            400,\n+            Instant.now(),\n+            null\n+        );\n+        return ResponseEntity.badRequest().body(response);\n+    }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

{

  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "The test run failed before tests started because `payments-ticketing` can’t resolve updated classes from `shared` when built standalone. I’m rerunning with `-am` to build required upstream modules in the same reactor, then I’ll fix test-level failures.",
    "phase": "commentary"
  }
}
```
